Class MeterBusiness

java.lang.Object
lcr.business.MeterBusiness
public class MeterBusiness extends Object
Factory and coordinator class responsible for initializing, selecting, and establishing connections to different supported LCR meter hardware models. * @author sylkat

    Method
    Description
    void
    connect(String port, SupportedMeter selectedModel)
    Instantiates the matching LcrMeter implementation based on the selected model type and opens the communication channel over the specified serial port link.

  • Method Details

    • connect

      public void connect(String port, SupportedMeter selectedModel)
      Instantiates the matching LcrMeter implementation based on the selected model type and opens the communication channel over the specified serial port link. * @param port the OS serial port name identifier
      Parameters:
      selectedModel - the specific hardware manufacturer enum model type
